violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. - Broken jug of ranch was sitting in handwashing sink.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory * was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. - No soap for hand washing.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --No Sanitizer for dishwashing. Did have sanitizer wipes, but using the scented wipes. Use only non scented wipes.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Overall floors, walls and ceiling need cleaning.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insects, rodents, or other pests were not controlled in a manner specified in the food service code to minimize their presence within the facility. - Fly control is an issue with this mobile. Fly strips can be used as long as they arent over or in proximity to food.
